creator: john_m_cooper@yahoo.com
text:
The Linux netscape plugin should be installed in:

	/usr/local/lib/netscape-linux/plugins

	and not

	/usr/local/lib/netscape/plugins

	installed in the correct directory (with linux-netscape-communicator
	port installed) it works for me.

Fix: 

1) re-work install to put plugin in correct directory;
	2) add RUN_DEPENDS for linux-netscape-communicator
How-To-Repeat: 	Observe pkg-plist and compare where Linux Netscape plugins actually
	belong on FreeBSD.
